message:
feat(policy_decision_log): add append-only decision log for forensics (ft-2shtw)

Implements PolicyDecisionLog: bounded append-only log of policy decisions with
chronological sequence numbers, eviction at capacity, filtering by decision/
actor/action/surface/time-range/pane, JSON and JSONL export for compliance,
counter tracking, and diagnostic snapshots. 17 unit tests + 19 property tests
(4 serde roundtrip + 15 behavioral invariants including counter consistency,
eviction arithmetic, and filter completeness).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
